title: Mirror Columns Should be Useable in Automations

posts.author: Golfetto11 (Ryan Golfetto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Devs,

There needs to be a way to use mirrored data/columns in automations. For example, I have Master Project Board (high level) columns that contain data mirrored from individual projects boards (low-level) and should be able to use those columns within an automation. A perfect example can be found below…

If a project’s start date (represented as a timeline column) begins, I am hoping for an automation to move the item to the “Active Projects” group of my Master Board. There is an existing recipe that would do this, however, since the column in question is a mirror column, I cannot use the recipe.

Is there any plans to make an update allowing the use of mirror columns in automations?

posts.author: mct (M. C. T.)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a crucial request. I second it.
